findings.description: EvalSlicer design correctly implements multi-dimensional rubrics. Slices filter results by predicate, preventing aggregate-hidden failures
Critical slice failures properly block promotion. If is_critical=True and status=failing, recommendations include CRITICAL block signal
Predicate evaluation safe: uses restricted namespace (__builtins__={}), item fields are type-checked (int, float, str, bool only)
Fail-closed: missing slices returns error, insufficient samples marked warning, eval errors return all_failing status
Operators can add new slices via register_slices_for_artifact_family() without code changes. Registry-based, not hardcoded

approval_comment: EvalSlicer design correctly addresses aggregate-hidden failures. Critical slice blocking enforced. Predicate evaluation safe. Design approved for implementation.
